How IHH Healthcare delivers Care. For Good. across 80+ hospitals with GLUCOSE.

One of the world's largest private healthcare networks, operating across 10 countries, uses GLUCOSE to provide personalized patient engagement while maintaining the highest standards of care and compliance.

Success Stories

RUFF CYCLES

Building Brand Love Through AI-Powered Support

How RUFF CYCLES uses GLUCOSE to provide 24/7 product expertise for their handcrafted European eBikes.
IHH Healthcare

Care. For Good. Powered by GLUCOSE

Scaling personalized patient engagement across 80+ hospitals while maintaining compliance and care standards.
Wareflex

Vietnam's First AI-Powered Logistics Platform

How LAVA AI, built on GLUCOSE, transforms logistics customer experience across 650+ warehouses.
"GLUCOSE transformed how we engage with customers post-purchase. The AI understands our bikes better than most humans—and it speaks our brand voice perfectly. Our customers get instant, accurate answers about everything from maintenance to accessories."
CEO
RUFF CYCLES
